results.title: Berkshire Hathaway's New Leader Has Loaded Up on Alphabet With $10 Billion in Cash. Here's the Likely Reason.
results.description: The conglomerate has dramatically increased its stake in a tech company Warren Buffett took a liking to toward the end of his tenure as CEO.
